notes: Report-only capability scaffold for Phase 1 of the test-suite quality remediation plan.
Capabilities describe environment or tool dependencies, not test quality tiers.
Counts are inferred from existing CTest labels plus command/name regexes until real CTest capability labels are applied.
Inferred matches are candidate labels, not proof that a test truly needs the capability; prefer undercounting where Pulp domain vocabulary collides with capability terms.

capabilities.title: Built Pulp CLI
capabilities.description: Tests that shell out to the built pulp CLI or its C++ delegate.
capabilities.expected_behavior: missing in required CLI/integration lanes should fail fast; optional lanes may skip with an explicit reason
missing_or_weak: Several shellout-style tests still need lane-aware preflight semantics instead of pass-like dependency guards.

capabilities.title: External Plugin Validators
capabilities.description: Tests or workflows that depend on auval, pluginval, clap-validator, or related format validators.
capabilities.expected_behavior: validator lanes should fail when the validator is expected and missing; scheduled/advisory lanes should report actionable unavailable status
missing_or_weak: Validator cadence is not yet a normal PR guarantee for adapter changes.

capabilities.title: GPU Or Graphics Adapter
capabilities.description: Tests that require a GPU adapter, renderer backend, or graphics capability beyond pure CPU parsing.
capabilities.expected_behavior: required graphics lanes should fail when the configured adapter cannot initialize; optional lanes should skip with a capability reason
missing_or_weak: GPU-dependent tests need consistent capability labels distinct from visual/golden quality tiers.

capabilities.title: Display Or Window Server
capabilities.description: Tests that need a live display, window server, screenshot host, or desktop capture path.
capabilities.expected_behavior: headless-required lanes should skip explicitly; display-required lanes should fail with diagnostics when the display server is unavailable
missing_or_weak: Display and screenshot dependencies are currently mixed with visual tier labels.

capabilities.title: iOS SDK Or Simulator
capabilities.description: Tests that configure, build, or validate iOS/AUv3 host or extension behavior.
capabilities.expected_behavior: Apple platform lanes should fail on missing expected SDKs; non-Apple lanes should skip because the capability is absent
missing_or_weak: iOS simulator/device expectations need clearer PR, nightly, and release ownership.

capabilities.title: Android SDK Or NDK
capabilities.description: Tests that require Android toolchains, emulator support, or Android packaging.
capabilities.expected_behavior: Android platform lanes should fail when configured toolchains are missing; other lanes should skip explicitly
missing_or_weak: Android smoke coverage exists but is not part of the required PR signal.

capabilities.title: Network Or Service Discovery
capabilities.description: Tests that use sockets, HTTP, OSC, service discovery, or network-like IPC.
capabilities.expected_behavior: network-dependent tests should distinguish unavailable local capability from product failures
missing_or_weak: Some runtime/event capabilities still need lane-specific skip reporting.

capabilities.title: Audio Device Or Host Audio IO
capabilities.description: Tests that depend on live audio device enumeration, host audio IO, or platform audio services.
capabilities.expected_behavior: offline DSP tests should not need this capability; live-device lanes should fail or skip based on lane contract
missing_or_weak: Most audio confidence should remain offline; live device expectations need explicit tiering.

capabilities.title: Node.js Or JavaScript Tooling
capabilities.description: Tests that invoke Node.js, bundlers, or JavaScript packaging helpers.
capabilities.expected_behavior: tooling lanes should fail when Node is expected and missing; optional import lanes should skip explicitly
missing_or_weak: JS tooling dependencies are not yet separated from parser/import quality tiers.

capabilities.title: Real Plugin Cache Or Installed Plugin
capabilities.description: Tests that depend on a real scanned plugin cache, installed plugin artifact, or external plugin binary.
capabilities.expected_behavior: host integration lanes should fail when a configured plugin artifact is missing; pure unit lanes should use fixtures or skip explicitly
missing_or_weak: Host/plugin-cache tests need clearer separation between fixture caches and required real plugin artifacts.
